feature.label: ABAP Clean Code Tool
feature.description:
ABAP Clean Code Tool — automated cleanup of ABAP source code based on the SAP Clean ABAP Styleguide.
Features: - 40+ cleanup rules covering syntax, declarations, naming, formatting - Configurable profiles (Essential, Default, Full, Custom) - Interactive diff view for reviewing changes - Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+4 (auto), Ctrl+Shift+4 (interactive) - Import/export profiles for team sharing
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 CleanABAP contributors. Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
